text: 🇷🇺 Putin is holding meeting with representatives of Russia's indigenous minorities 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 普京正在与俄罗斯原住民代表举行会议 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 Israeli Army Radio: The IDF major in the smuggling indictment is the acting battalion commander and sector commander of the Kerem Shalom crossing. According to the indictment, he falsely told the shift commander that the truck was for operational purposes…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 i24NEWS: An IDF major is accused in a smuggling indictment of smuggling goods into Gaza to cover a multimillion-shekel debt to crime boss Firas Naaimi. According to the indictment, the officer used his authority to bring in a truck loaded with about 1.7 million shekels' worth of goods, evading more than 7 million shekels in taxes. When the plan went wrong, he brought an Israeli civilian into the Strip and left him there for two days, despite the risk to his life. The officer also fabricated a cover story claiming he acted under threats, including a photo of his brother with a gun to his head, and later broke his phone to destroy evidence. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 以色列陆军电台：涉嫌走私被起诉的以色列国防军少校是凯雷姆沙洛姆口岸的代理营长兼区域指挥官。根据起诉书，他谎称卡车是用于作战目的，骗过了值班指挥官……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 i24NEWS：一名以色列国防军少校在走私起诉书中被指控向加沙走私货物，以偿还欠犯罪头目 Firas Naaimi 的数百万谢克尔债务。根据起诉书，该军官利用职权带入了一辆装载价值约 170 万谢克尔货物的卡车，逃避了超过 700 万谢克尔的税款。当计划出错时，他将一名以色列平民带入加沙地带并将其留在那里两天，尽管这危及了该平民的生命。该军官还编造了一个掩盖故事，声称自己是在威胁下行事，包括一张他兄弟被枪指着头的照片，后来他销毁了手机以毁灭证据。 @wfwitness

text: Let us be very clear The Israeli attacks on south Lebanon are targeting the families that came back The high number of women and children deaths is a clear indicator Anyone claiming anything else is lying
text_zh: 让我们明确一点：以色列对黎巴嫩南部的袭击目标是那些返回家园的家庭。妇女和儿童死亡人数之多是一个明显的指标。任何声称其他情况的人都在撒谎。

text: The funeral of the victims from the Civil defense in Tyre was carried today. The representative of the Lebanese Government was kicked out
text_zh: 今天举行了提尔民防部门遇难者的葬礼。黎巴嫩政府代表被赶了出去。

text: 🇪🇺 🇷🇺 Kallas stated that the EU does not intend to restore relations with Russia even after the end of the war in Ukraine. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇪🇺 Kallas is upset that American weapons are arriving in the EU with delays, while Russia is profiting from rising oil prices. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "❗️The Israeli army soldiers who shelled our towns and showered our houses with artillery have been successfully hit in Shomera as announced by Hezbullah and confirmed by the IDF" Lots of lovely secondaries
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Lebanese News and Updates：“❗️正如真主党所宣布并经以色列国防军证实，在舒梅拉（Shomera），炮击我们城镇并用火炮轰炸我们房屋的以色列军队士兵已被成功击中。” 真是美妙的二次爆炸

text: Israel has expanded the restricted military zone in Gaza, according to new maps shared with aid groups, bringing nearly two-thirds of the territory under effective control. The newly marked “orange line” indicates areas where humanitarian organizations must coordinate movements with the Israeli military. While Israel says the changes are meant to support aid delivery and do not target civilians, many displaced Palestinians fear entering these zones could put them at risk. Aid access has also been reduced due to safety concerns. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 根据与援助组织共享的新地图，以色列扩大了加沙的军事限制区，使近三分之二的领土处于其有效控制之下。新标记的“橙色线”标示了人道主义组织必须与以色列军方协调行动的区域。虽然以色列表示这些变化旨在支持援助物资的运送，并不针对平民，但许多流离失所的巴勒斯坦人担心进入这些区域可能会使他们面临风险。由于安全担忧，援助渠道也已减少。来源：路透社

text: ⭕️ Wonderful footage from yesterday in Bayada where an FPV was able to locate 3 well hidden Humvees. The FPV slowly approached the middle vehicle to destroy it and by its fire destroy the surrounding two. Israeli soldiers are inside this house. Unfortunately Hezbullah is unable to attack it, else it would have been dozens of soldierss
text_zh: ⭕️ 昨天在巴亚达（Bayada）拍摄的精彩画面，一架 FPV 无人机定位了 3 辆隐藏得很好的悍马车。FPV 无人机缓慢靠近中间的车辆将其摧毁，并通过其火力摧毁了周围的两辆。以色列士兵就在这所房子里。不幸的是，真主党无法攻击它，否则那将是几十名士兵。

text: WarTranslated For the second day, drones "visited" Perm. Following the attack, an emergency was declared in the city due to a "release of a hazardous substance". https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049809769418932604/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：无人机连续第二天“造访”彼尔姆。袭击发生后，由于“有害物质泄漏”，该市宣布进入紧急状态。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049809769418932604/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Bloomberg, U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has requested the deployment of the U.S. Army's long-range hypersonic weapon (LRHW), aka "Dark Eagle," for use in Operation Epic Fury. The LRHW is still in development, having only completed a handful of classified tests to date. The request to the Pentagon comes due, in part, to Iran has moving their missiles out of range of the Precision Strike Missile. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据彭博社报道，美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）已请求部署美国陆军的远程高超音速武器（LRHW），又称“暗鹰”（Dark Eagle），用于“史诗之怒”（Epic Fury）行动。LRHW 仍处于开发阶段，迄今仅完成了少数几次机密测试。向五角大楼提出这一请求的部分原因是伊朗已将其导弹移出了精确打击导弹（PrSM）的射程范围。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: By the will and power of God, the bright future of the Persian Gulf region will be one without America, dedicated instead to the progress, comfort, and prosperity of its peoples. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）：凭借上帝的意志和力量，波斯湾地区光明的未来将是一个没有美国、致力于其人民进步、舒适和繁荣的未来。推文

text: Open Source Intel The Islamic regime is not behaving, they could have waited for after President Trumps visit to China… they seem like they want to escalation before then. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：伊斯兰政权表现不佳，他们本可以等到特朗普总统访问中国之后……他们似乎想在那之前升级局势。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: We and our neighbors across the waters of the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman share a common destiny. Foreigners who come from thousands of kilometers away with greedy intentions have no place there, except at the bottom of its waters. This chain of victories, achieved by the grace of God and through the policies of resistance and the strategy of a strong Iran, will mark the dawn of a new regional and global order. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：我们与波斯湾和阿曼海对岸的邻国有着共同的命运。那些怀着贪婪意图从数千公里外赶来的外国人，除了沉入海底，在那里没有立足之地。这一连串的胜利，是靠上帝的恩典、抵抗政策和强大伊朗的战略取得的，将标志着一个新的区域和全球秩序的黎明。推文

text: Open Source Intel Based on what Khamenei Jr. is saying today, it is more likely they are going to get a beat down the not. They are asking for it. Not very smart. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：根据哈梅内伊二世今天的言论，他们更有可能遭到痛打。这是他们自找的。不太明智。推文

text: Open Source Intel Twelve soldiers wounded in a Hezbollah drone strike near Shomera this morning. Two in moderate condition, the rest in good condition. The drone hit an armored cargo carrier, setting it on fire and detonating nearby artillery shells. IDF investigating whether the drone was fiber optic-guided, immune to electronic jamming. Hezbollah has used the method repeatedly in recent weeks. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：今天上午，真主党在舒梅拉附近的一次无人机袭击中造成 12 名士兵受伤。两人伤势中等，其余人状况良好。无人机击中了一辆装甲货运车，引发火灾并引爆了附近的炮弹。以色列国防军正在调查该无人机是否为光纤制导，从而不受电子干扰的影响。真主党最近几周多次使用这种方法。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Supreme Leader: Iran to guard missile and nuclear tech like its borders. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：伊朗最高领袖：伊朗将像守护边境一样守护导弹和核技术。推文

text: Nuno Felix Oh, come on man… don’t toe up in details a superbly armed and integrated Europe. We can manage, with continental resources, anything we need by ourselves. No need for locals, we know best! On a serious note: people disregard what a united Europe can achieve and how that Old Vampire will have an agenda. To circle back to this point, the debate about whether Europeans can defend themselves is based on faulty assumptions that distract from more salient debates about what EU Europeans should or should not do with renewed military capabilities as rearmament begins to take shape - Alexander Clarkson  tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix：噢，得了吧伙计……不要在细节上纠结于一个装备精良且一体化的欧洲。我们可以利用大陆资源，自己管理我们需要的一切。不需要当地人，我们最清楚！严肃地说：人们忽视了一个团结的欧洲能取得什么成就，以及那个“老吸血鬼”会有什么议程。回到这一点，关于欧洲人能否自卫的辩论是基于错误的假设，这些假设分散了人们对更突出辩论的注意力，即随着重整军备开始成形，欧盟欧洲人应该或不应该利用更新后的军事能力做什么——亚历山大·克拉克森（Alexander Clarkson） 推文

text: Faytuks News Trump seriously considering conducting new strikes on Iran -i24 US Central Command commander Brad Cooper will brief Trump on his military options today tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：特朗普正认真考虑对伊朗进行新的打击——美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀（Brad Cooper）今天将向特朗普简要介绍其军事选项。推文

text: Hungary’s incoming leader Péter Magyar wants stronger rights for ethnic Hungarians in Ukraine before supporting Ukraine’s EU membership talks. He raised this with Antonio Costa as the EU pushes Hungary to drop its opposition to opening negotiations with Ukraine. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 匈牙利候任领导人彼得·马雅尔（Péter Magyar）希望在支持乌克兰加入欧盟的谈判之前，为乌克兰境内的匈牙利族裔争取更强有力的权利。他在欧盟推动匈牙利放弃反对开启乌克兰入盟谈判之际，向安东尼奥·科斯塔（Antonio Costa）提出了这一要求。来源：彭博社

text: {وَإِن يَرَوْا كِسْفًا مِّنَ السَّمَاءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ} - [الطور - 44]
text_zh: {他们若看见天降下碎片，他们必说：‘这是堆积的云。’} - [古兰经 - 山岳章 - 44]

text: ❗️ The Israeli army soldiers who shelled our towns and showered our houses with artillery have been successfully hit in Shomera as announced by Hezbullah and confirmed by the IDF Twelve soldiers were wounded in Hezbullah's drone attack on a military position near the northern border community of Shomera this morning. Many others, not counted, are facing brain concussion and ear issues.
text_zh: ❗️ 黎巴嫩真主党宣布并经以色列国防军证实，炮击我们城镇、用火炮轰炸我们房屋的以色列军队士兵在舒梅拉（Shomera）遭到成功打击。今天上午，真主党对北部边境社区舒梅拉附近的一个军事阵地发动无人机袭击，造成12名士兵受伤。另有许多未被计入的人员出现脑震荡和耳部问题。

text: 🟡 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Drone attack hits Israeli army vehicle in Al-Bayyadah, South Lebanon — April 29 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🟡 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部拜亚达（Al-Bayyadah）的一辆以色列军车 — 4月29日 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: The Islamic Republic of Iran, by giving practical thanks for the blessing of exercising control over the Strait of Hormuz, will secure the Persian Gulf region and eliminate the hostile enemy’s misuse of this waterway. The legal frameworks and new management of the Strait of Hormuz will bring comfort and progress for the benefit of all nations in the region, and its economic blessings will bring joy to the hearts of the people—by the will of God, even if the disbelievers dislike it.
text_zh: 伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：伊朗伊斯兰共和国通过对行使霍尔木兹海峡控制权这一恩典表示实际感谢，将确保波斯湾地区的安全，并消除敌对势力对这一水道的滥用。霍尔木兹海峡的法律框架和新管理模式将为该地区所有国家带来舒适与进步，其经济红利将使人民心满意足——若真主意欲，即使不信者不悦。

text: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: We and our neighbors across the waters of the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman share a common destiny. Foreigners who come from thousands of kilometers away with greedy intentions have no place there—except at the bottom of its waters. This chain of victories, achieved by the grace of God and through the policies of resistance and the strategy of a strong Iran, will mark the dawn of a new regional and global order.
text_zh: 伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：我们与波斯湾和阿曼海对岸的邻国命运与共。那些从数千公里外怀揣贪婪意图而来的外国人，在那里没有立足之地——除了沉入海底。这一连串的胜利，得益于真主的恩典，得益于抵抗政策和强大伊朗的战略，将标志着一个新的区域和全球秩序的黎明。

text: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: By the will and power of God, the bright future of the Persian Gulf region will be one without America—dedicated instead to the progress, comfort, and prosperity of its peoples.
text_zh: 伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：若真主意欲并赐予力量，波斯湾地区光明的未来将不再有美国——而是致力于其人民的进步、舒适与繁荣。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli forces have demolished several Hezbollah combat positions on the Lebanese side of Mount Dov during a recent raid. The operation, led by the elite Alpinist Unit and the Yahalom combat engineering unit, destroyed rocket‑launching posts and other military infrastructure. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军队在最近的一次突袭中摧毁了多夫山（Mount Dov）黎巴嫩一侧的几个真主党作战阵地。此次行动由精锐的高山部队（Alpinist Unit）和Yahalom战斗工程部队领导，摧毁了火箭发射阵地和其他军事基础设施。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🌟⚡️🇮🇱 A Hezbollah drone reportedly hit an Israeli military vehicle in the Shomera area, causing its destruction. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost" 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli media: 12 soldiers of the Israeli army were injured today due to a drone attack in Shomera. Two soldiers suffered moderate injuries and 10 suffered minor injuries. There are a number of other soldiers suffering from anxiety and ringing in the ears, and they may be transferred to the hospital later. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🌟⚡️🇮🇱 据报道，一架真主党无人机击中了舒梅拉地区的一辆以色列军车，导致其被毁。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost” 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列媒体：今天，由于舒梅拉发生无人机袭击，以色列军队的12名士兵受伤。两名士兵受中度伤，10名士兵受轻伤。还有一些士兵患有焦虑症和耳鸣，他们可能会在稍后被送往医院。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah released footage of an attack drone striking an Israeli military Humvee in the southern Lebanese town of Al‑Bayyada, claiming a direct hit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布了攻击无人机击中黎巴嫩南部拜亚达镇一辆以色列军用悍马车的画面，声称直接命中。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Supreme Leader: Iran will dismantle 'US exploitation’ of Hormuz. Iranian state media: A message from Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei will shortly be published on the occasion of national Persian Gulf Day. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049798085656588728/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）伊朗最高领袖：伊朗将拆除“美国对霍尔木兹海峡的剥削”。伊朗官方媒体：值此全国波斯湾日之际，最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的消息即将发布。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049798085656588728/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran supreme leader: ‘Today, with two months having passed since the world's tyrants' largest military mobilization and aggression in the region and America's humiliating defeat in its own scheme, a new chapter for the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz is taking shape.’ Iranian state media: A message from Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei will shortly be published on the occasion of national Persian Gulf Day. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049798085656588728/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）伊朗最高领袖：“今天，距离世界暴君在这一地区进行最大规模的军事动员和侵略，以及美国在其自身计划中遭遇羞辱性失败已经过去了两个月，波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的新篇章正在形成。” 伊朗官方媒体：值此全国波斯湾日之际，最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的消息即将发布。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049798085656588728/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @TheAviationist : 👀 👀 AGM-183 ARRW Shown on B-1B Bomber for the First Time For the first time, we got a glimpse of a B-1B Lancer bomber flying with an AGM-183 ARRW hypersonic weapon carried externally. Full story here: https://theaviationist.com/2026/04/30/agm-183-arrw-shown-on-b-1b-bomber-for-the-first-time/ tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @TheAviationist : 👀 👀 AGM-183 ARRW首次在B-1B轰炸机上展示。我们首次瞥见了一架B-1B枪骑兵轰炸机，其外部挂载了AGM-183 ARRW高超音速武器飞行。完整报道请见：https://theaviationist.com/2026/04/30/agm-183-arrw-shown-on-b-1b-bomber-for-the-first-time/ 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian state media: A message from Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei will shortly be published on the occasion of national Persian Gulf Day. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049798085656588728/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）伊朗官方媒体：值此全国波斯湾日之际，最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的消息即将发布。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049798085656588728/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF says it demolished several Hezbollah combat positions on the Lebanese side of Mount Dov, including rocket-launching posts. The raid was led by the Alpinist Unit and Yahalom Combat Engineering Unit. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049797301661532273/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列国防军称，已摧毁多夫山黎巴嫩一侧的几个真主党作战阵地，包括火箭发射阵地。此次突袭由高山部队和Yahalom战斗工程部队领导。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049797301661532273/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF has issued evacuation warnings for several villages in southern Lebanon ahead of airstrikes on Hezbollah. Residents of Sammaaiyeh, Hanniyeh, Qlaileh, Wadi Jilou, Kniseh, Kafra, Majdal Zoun, and Seddiqin were told to move at least one kilometer away. IDF Spokesman Col. Avichay Adraee: "Hezbollah activities are forcing the IDF to act against it, as it does not intend to harm you." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）在对真主党进行空袭之前，以色列国防军已对黎巴嫩南部的几个村庄发出撤离警告。Sammaaiyeh、Hanniyeh、Qlaileh、Wadi Jilou、Kniseh、Kafra、Majdal Zoun和Seddiqin的居民被告知至少撤离一公里。以色列国防军发言人阿维查伊·阿德拉伊（Avichay Adraee）上校：“真主党的活动迫使以色列国防军对其采取行动，因为我们无意伤害你们。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel British activist Hussain Hoz Shafiei claims Mossad was behind 9/11 and that the Bondi Beach shooting was engineered to give Australian Jews "protected class" status. He called the Israeli lobby a "corrosive force" occupying Western democracies. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049796568241279347/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）英国活动家侯赛因·霍兹·沙菲（Hussain Hoz Shafiei）声称摩萨德是9/11事件的幕后黑手，并称邦迪海滩枪击案是为赋予澳大利亚犹太人“受保护阶层”地位而精心策划的。他称以色列游说团体是占领西方民主国家的“腐蚀性力量”。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049796568241279347/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The IDF reports that twelve Israeli soldiers were wounded in a Hezbollah FPV attack on a military position near the northern border community of Shomera this morning. Two of the soldiers were moderately hurt; the rest are in good condition. The drone, launched from Lebanon, struck an armoured cargo carrier, which caught fire. Several artillery shells in the area also exploded. The military is investigating whether the drone was guided by a fibre‑optic cable. Hezbollah has been using such fibre‑optic guided drones repeatedly in recent weeks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军报告称，今天上午，黎巴嫩真主党对北部边境社区舒梅拉（Shomera）附近的一个军事阵地发动了FPV无人机袭击，造成12名以色列士兵受伤。其中两名士兵伤势中等，其余人员状况良好。这架从黎巴嫩发射的无人机击中了一辆装甲货运车，导致其起火。该地区的几枚炮弹也发生了爆炸。军方正在调查该无人机是否由光纤电缆引导。真主党在最近几周多次使用此类光纤制导无人机。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 Kan: A regular‑service major has been indicted for smuggling goods from Israel into the Gaza Strip and for bringing an Israeli civilian into Gaza. The military prosecution filed charges yesterday, including aiding the enemy, bribery, and aggravated…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Israeli Army Radio: The IDF major in the smuggling indictment is the acting battalion commander and sector commander of the Kerem Shalom crossing. According to the indictment, he falsely told the shift commander that the truck was for operational purposes and should not be stopped or filmed. After the truck parked inside Gaza, troops became suspicious; the officer ordered them to stand down, saying he would handle it personally. When the Gazan driver refused to collect the truck, the officer sent his accomplice into Gaza to drive it to Deir al-Balah, then left him there for two days. The accomplice was eventually rescued with the help of another soldier – whose identity remains unknown to the prosecution. Smuggled items included 125,000 cigarettes, 2,000 kg of tobacco, 600 mobile phones, 10 electric bicycles, 100 batteries, and 10 laptops, with a total value exceeding 7 million shekels. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 Kan：一名现役少校因将货物从以色列走私到加沙地带并带一名以色列平民进入加沙而被起诉。军事检察官昨天提出了指控，包括协助敌人、贿赂和加重情节……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列陆军电台：走私起诉书中的这名以色列国防军少校是凯雷姆沙洛姆（Kerem Shalom）过境点的代理营长和部门指挥官。根据起诉书，他向轮班指挥官谎称这辆卡车是用于作战目的，不应被拦截或拍摄。卡车停在加沙内部后，部队产生了怀疑；该军官命令他们撤退，称他会亲自处理。当加沙司机拒绝接收卡车时，该军官派他的同伙进入加沙将其开往代尔拜拉赫（Deir al-Balah），然后将他留在那里两天。该同伙最终在另一名士兵的帮助下获救——该士兵的身份检察官尚不清楚。走私物品包括12.5万支香烟、2000公斤烟草、600部手机、10辆电动自行车、100块电池和10台笔记本电脑，总价值超过700万谢克尔。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇮🇷 Leader of the Revolution's Message on the Occasion of National Persian Gulf Day — Part 2 - Today, by the grace of the Almighty God, and by the blessing of the blood of the oppressed martyrs of the imposed war, especially the great and far-sighted leader…" 🇮🇷 Leader of the Revolution's Message on the Occasion of National Persian Gulf Day — Part 3 - Today, the miraculous awakening of the Iranian nation is not limited to tens of millions of devoted souls fighting against Zionism and bloodthirsty America, but ahead of the united ranks of the sent Islamic Ummah; ninety million proud and honorable Iranian compatriots inside and outside the country consider all identity, spiritual, human, scientific, industrial, and fundamental and modern technologies—from nano and bio to nuclear and missile—as their national capital and will guard them like their maritime, land, and air borders. - The Islamic Iran, with practical gratitude for the blessing of managing the Strait of Hormuz, will secure the Persian Gulf region and remove the enemy's hostile abuses from this waterway. The legal rules and the new management of the Strait of Hormuz will bring comfort and progress for the benefit of all the peoples of the region, and its economic blessings will delight the hearts of the people; God willing, even if the disbelievers dislike it. Seyyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei 30 April 2026
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇮🇷 革命领袖在全国波斯湾日之际的致辞 — 第2部分 - 今天，承蒙全能上帝的恩典，并借着强加战争中受压迫烈士的鲜血的祝福，特别是伟大而富有远见的领袖……” 🇮🇷 革命领袖在全国波斯湾日之际的致辞 — 第3部分 - 今天，伊朗民族的奇迹觉醒不仅限于数千万致力于打击犹太复国主义和嗜血美国的忠诚灵魂，而且走在团结一致的伊斯兰乌玛（Ummah）行列之前；国内外九千万自豪而光荣的伊朗同胞将所有身份、精神、人文、科学、工业以及基础和现代技术——从纳米和生物到核能和导弹——视为他们的国家资本，并将像守护他们的海洋、陆地和空中边界一样守护它们。 - 伊斯兰伊朗，怀着对管理霍尔木兹海峡这一祝福的实际感激之情，将确保波斯湾地区的安全，并消除敌人对这条水道的敌对滥用。霍尔木兹海峡的法律规则和新管理模式将为该地区所有人民带来舒适和进步，其经济福祉将令人民心满意足；如果上帝愿意，即使不信者不喜欢它。赛义德·穆杰塔巴·侯赛尼·哈梅内伊 2026年4月30日

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Israeli jet squadron above Daraa Governorate according to local sources. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 据当地消息来源称，以色列喷气式飞机中队出现在德拉省（Daraa Governorate）上空。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇦🇪 Iraqi Kurdistan Region President Nechirvan Barzani met with UAE President Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan in Abu Dhabi to discuss relations between Iraq, the Kurdistan Region and the UAE, and the impact of regional developments. Both sides emphasised reinforcing cooperation to promote stability and security across the region. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇦🇪 伊拉克库尔德斯坦地区总统内奇尔万·巴尔扎尼（Nechirvan Barzani）在阿布扎比会见了阿联酋总统穆罕默德·本·扎耶德·阿勒纳哈扬（Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan），讨论伊拉克、库尔德斯坦地区与阿联酋之间的关系，以及地区事态发展的影响。双方强调加强合作，以促进整个地区的稳定与安全。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇮🇷 Leader of the Revolution's Message on the Occasion of National Persian Gulf Day In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful - One of the unparalleled blessings of Almighty God for the Muslim nations of our region, especially the honorable…" 🇮🇷 Leader of the Revolution's Message on the Occasion of National Persian Gulf Day — Part 2 - Today, by the grace of the Almighty God, and by the blessing of the blood of the oppressed martyrs of the imposed war, especially the great and far-sighted leader of the Islamic Revolution, may his exalted status be honored, it has been proven not only among the public opinion of the world and the peoples of the region, but even for the kings and rulers of countries, that the presence of foreign Americans and their nesting and settling in the lands of the Persian Gulf is the most important factor of insecurity in the region. The fragile American bases do not even have the strength to ensure their own security, let alone hope to provide security for the dependents and America-worshippers of the region. - By the power and help of God, the bright future of the Persian Gulf region will be a future without America and in the service of the progress, comfort, and welfare of its peoples. We are "fellow destinies" with our neighbors in the waters of the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman, and foreigners who maliciously covet from thousands of kilometers away have no place there except at the bottom of its waters. And the chain of this victory, which by the grace of the Blessed and Exalted Lord has been realized under the shadow of the policies and strategies of resistance and the strategy of a strong Iran, will be the dawn of a new order for the region and the world. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇮🇷 革命领袖在全国波斯湾日之际的致辞 以真主之名，至仁至慈 - 全能上帝对我们地区穆斯林国家，特别是尊贵的……” 🇮🇷 革命领袖在全国波斯湾日之际的致辞 — 第2部分 - 今天，承蒙全能上帝的恩典，并借着强加战争中受压迫烈士的鲜血的祝福，特别是伊斯兰革命伟大而富有远见的领袖（愿其崇高地位受到尊崇），不仅在世界舆论和地区人民中，甚至对于各国的国王和统治者来说，都已经证明，外国美国人的存在及其在波斯湾土地上的筑巢和定居是该地区不安全的最重要因素。脆弱的美国基地甚至没有能力确保自身的安全，更不用说指望为该地区的附庸和崇美者提供安全了。 - 凭借上帝的力量和帮助，波斯湾地区光明的未来将是一个没有美国的未来，并将服务于其人民的进步、舒适和福祉。我们与波斯湾和阿曼海的邻国是“命运共同体”，那些从数千公里外恶意觊觎的外国人除了沉入海底外，在那里没有立足之地。而这一胜利的连锁反应，在全能全尊主的恩典下，在抵抗政策和强大伊朗战略的阴影下得以实现，将成为该地区和世界新秩序的黎明。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 助力

text: 🇮🇷 Leader of the Revolution's Message on the Occasion of National Persian Gulf Day In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful - One of the unparalleled blessings of Almighty God for the Muslim nations of our region, especially the honorable people of Islamic Iran, is the gift of the "Persian Gulf". - A blessing beyond a mere body of water that has shaped part of our identity and civilization, and besides being a point of connection between nations, it has created a vital and unique route for the global economy through the Strait of Hormuz and thereafter the Sea of Oman. - This strategic asset has aroused the greed of many devils over past centuries, and the history of repeated invasions by European and American foreigners, insecurities, damages, and numerous threats to the countries of the region is only a glimpse of the sinister plans of the world's oppressors against the inhabitants of the Persian Gulf region, the latest example of which was the recent provocations by the Great Satan. - The Iranian nation, which has the longest land coastline along the Persian Gulf, has made the greatest sacrifices for the independence of the Persian Gulf and in confronting foreigners and aggressors; from expelling the Portuguese and liberating the Strait of Hormuz, which is the basis for naming the 30th of April as National Persian Gulf Day, to fighting against Dutch colonialism and the heroic resistance against British colonialism, and more. However, the Islamic Revolution was a turning point in these resistances, cutting the hands of oppressors from the Persian Gulf region. Today, two months after the largest military campaign and the arrogant aggression of the world's bullies in the region and the disgraceful defeat of America in its plan, a new chapter for the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz is being written. - The peoples of the Persian Gulf region, who for many years had become accustomed to the silence and submission of their rulers in the face of bullies and aggressors, have witnessed in the past sixty days the beautiful manifestations of firmness, vigilance, and the heroic struggle of the naval forces of the Army and the IRGC alongside the zeal and bravery of the people and youth of the southern region of dear Iran in rejecting foreign domination.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 革命领袖在全国波斯湾日之际的致辞 以真主之名，至仁至慈 - 全能上帝给予我们地区穆斯林国家，特别是伊斯兰伊朗尊贵人民的无与伦比的祝福之一，就是“波斯湾”的礼物。 - 这不仅仅是一片水域，它塑造了我们部分身份和文明，除了作为国家之间的连接点外，它还通过霍尔木兹海峡及随后的阿曼海为全球经济创造了一条至关重要且独特的路线。 - 这一战略资产在过去几个世纪里激起了许多魔鬼的贪婪，欧洲和美国外国人的反复入侵、不安全、破坏以及对该地区国家的无数威胁的历史，只是世界压迫者针对波斯湾地区居民的险恶计划的一瞥，最近的一个例子就是“大撒旦”最近的挑衅。 - 拥有波斯湾沿岸最长陆地海岸线的伊朗民族，为波斯湾的独立以及在对抗外国人和侵略者方面做出了最大的牺牲；从驱逐葡萄牙人和解放霍尔木兹海峡（这是将4月30日定为全国波斯湾日的基础），到反抗荷兰殖民主义和反抗英国殖民主义的英雄抵抗等等。然而，伊斯兰革命是这些抵抗运动的转折点，切断了压迫者伸向波斯湾地区的黑手。今天，在世界恶霸在该地区进行最大规模军事行动和傲慢侵略两个月后，以及美国计划惨败之后，波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的新篇章正在书写。 - 波斯湾地区的人民，多年来已经习惯了他们的统治者在恶霸和侵略者面前的沉默和顺从，在过去六十天里见证了军队和伊斯兰革命卫队海军力量的坚定、警惕和英雄斗争的美好表现，以及亲爱的伊朗南部地区人民和青年的热情和勇敢，他们拒绝外国统治。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei, in a message marking Persian Gulf Day, described the waterway as a divine gift and a strategic asset that has long attracted foreign greed. He said Iran has made the greatest sacrifices to secure the Persian Gulf’s independence, including the liberation of the Strait of Hormuz, which became the basis for naming the national day. The Islamic Revolution was a turning point that shortened the hands of arrogant powers in the region, he added. Referring to “the biggest military deployment and aggression by the world’s bullies” over the past 60 days, he said America’s humiliating defeat in its plan is now writing a new chapter for the Gulf and Hormuz. He stated that it has become clear to world opinion and even to regional rulers that “the presence of America is the most important factor of insecurity” and that U.S. bases cannot guarantee their own security. The future of the Gulf, he argued, will be one without America, serving the progress and welfare of local nations. Khamenei said Iran will secure the Persian Gulf through its new management of the Strait of Hormuz, ending hostile exploitation of the waterway. “The rules of law and the new management of the Strait of Hormuz will bring comfort and progress for the benefit of all nations of the region,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）在纪念波斯湾日的致辞中，将这条水道描述为神圣的礼物和长期吸引外国贪婪的战略资产。他说，伊朗为确保波斯湾的独立做出了最大的牺牲，包括解放霍尔木兹海峡，这成为了命名该国定日子的基础。他补充说，伊斯兰革命是一个转折点，缩短了傲慢势力在该地区的黑手。提到过去60天“世界恶霸最大的军事部署和侵略”，他说美国计划的羞辱性失败现在正在为波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡书写新篇章。他指出，世界舆论甚至地区统治者都已经清楚，“美国的存在是不安全的最重要因素”，美国基地无法保证自身的安全。他认为，波斯湾的未来将是一个没有美国的未来，服务于当地国家的进步和福祉。哈梅内伊表示，伊朗将通过对霍尔木兹海峡的新管理来确保波斯湾的安全，结束对该水道的敌对剥削。他说：“法律规则和霍尔木兹海峡的新管理将为该地区所有国家带来舒适和进步。” @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: 🛑 Imam Sayyid Mojtaba Khamenei's message on the occasion of National Persian Gulf Day will be published in minutes. @MKhamenei_en
text_zh: 🔄 转发自阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：🛑 伊玛目赛义德·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊在全国波斯湾日之际的致辞将在几分钟内发布。 @MKhamenei_en
